query_title: The Chaos Class Is Waking Up

recommendations.title: The Chaos Class Failed the Class
recommendations.overview: A young and beautiful female teacher starts working in an all boys high school.

recommendations.title: Saban, Son of Saban
recommendations.overview: Clumsy soldiers Şaban and Ramazan fall for a singer-dancer and accidentally become secret policemen tracking down a missing diamond.

recommendations.title: The Foster Brothers
recommendations.overview: Saban, Ramazan and Bayram are sailors in an Ottoman Navy and Hüsamettin is their commander. Hüsamettin's aide Ramazan, Saban who is foster son of Hüsamettin's sister and Bayram who is married to Hüsamettin's niece stays at Hüsamettin's family residen

recommendations.title: My Friends
recommendations.overview: Four inseparable friends try to face their midlife crisis with daytrips and pranks at the expense of their families and the people around them.

recommendations.title: Daisies
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls embark on a series of destructive pranks in which they consume and destroy the world around them.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: The Marquis of Grillo
recommendations.overview: In 18th-century Rome, impish aristocrat Onofrio del Grillo amuses himself by playing pranks on all sorts of people — his reactionary family and fellow nobles, the poors, the French occupiers trying to modernize society, and even the Pope himself.

recommendations.title: The Half of It
recommendations.overview: Shy, straight-A student Ellie is hired by sweet but inarticulate jock Paul, who needs help wooing the most popular girl in school. But their new and unlikely friendship gets tricky when Ellie discovers she has feelings for the same girl.
